ui.user_menu.title: Account and Settings
auth.welcome_back_subtitle: Choose how you'd like to continue.

auth.logout_confirm.title: Log out
auth.logout_confirm.subtitle: You'll need to sign in again to come back.
hub.empty_state_description: Create your own business or join an existing one with an invite code
createBusiness.logo_invalid_type: Please select a PNG, JPG, or WebP image
createBusiness.error_all_fields_required: Please fill in all required fields
createBusiness.name_subtitle: Pick something you'll be proud to put on the door.
createBusiness.locale_subtitle: Pick the region where you do business.
createBusiness.logo_subtitle: Optional. A logo, a photo, or skip and we'll use the trade icon.
products.no_results: No products found matching that criteria
products.empty_state_description: Add your first product to start building your catalog
products.info_drawer_no_barcode: No barcode set for this product.
productForm.ai_step_photo_instructions: Take a clear, well-lit photo of the product. Center it in the frame and avoid glare.
productForm.success_created_description: The product has been created successfully
productForm.success_deleted_description: The product has been deleted successfully
productForm.choose_photo_desc: We'll move on once you pick a photo
productSettings.title: Product Settings
productSettings.sort_preference_hint: Default sorting for the product list
barcode.label: Barcode value
barcode.ai_barcode_intro: Scan the product's existing barcode, generate a new one, or skip to complete this setup later.
barcode.scanner_error_generic: Could not start the camera. Please try again.
barcode.scanner_error_permission: Camera permissions are disabled. Enable camera access in your browser settings, or choose a file instead.
barcode.scanner_error_not_found: No camera was found on this device.
barcode.scanner_error_in_use: The camera is in use by another app. Close other apps and try again.
aiPipeline.may_take_seconds: This may take a few seconds
aiPipeline.no_category_fit: We couldn't fit this product into one of your existing categories. Create a new one to keep things organized:
aiPipeline.pick_existing_intro: Pick an existing category for this product:
aiPipeline.error_fallback: We couldn't finish analyzing this photo. Please try again.
joinBusiness.transfer_wants_to_transfer: wants to transfer ownership of this business to you.
joinBusiness.transfer_you_will_become_ow: You will become the new owner.
joinBusiness.success_transfer_descriptio: You are now the owner of {name}
joinBusiness.code_subtitle: Punch in the six-character code from your team.
navigation.load_failed: Couldn't load page. Check your connection and try again.
account.profile_avatar_invalid_type: Please select a PNG, JPG, or WebP image
account.incoming_transfer_description: {name} wants to transfer {business} to you. You will become the new owner.
account.incoming_transfer_description_an: The current owner wants to transfer {business} to you. You will become the new owner.
account.incoming_transfer_success_subtit: You are now the owner of {business}. Tap step in to refresh and start managing.
account.about_description: Kasero is a multi-business management system for small businesses -- food vendors, artisans, retailers. Built for speed, simplicity, and offline capability.
account.delete_blocked_description: You cannot delete your account while you own businesses. Transfer ownership or delete each one first.
account.theme_description_system: Automatically adjusts based on your device
account.theme_hero_subtitle: Pick the lighting that suits the room you're working in.
account.language_modal_subtitle: Pick the language the app speaks to you.
account.profile_hero_subtitle: Your name and photo show up across every business you join.
account.delete_hero_subtitle: This empties the drawer for good. Read the receipts below before signing.
account.delete_warning_item_memberships: Every business you've joined will lose you as a member
account.delete_warning_item_invites: Pending invitations and transfers tied to you
account.delete_warning_item_irreversible: There is no recovery once this is done
account.delete_otp_hero_subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to confirm.
account.email_change_hero_subtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code to your current email and your new one to confirm the change.
account.email_change_same_warning: Same as current — choose a different address
account.email_change_step2_subtitle: Codes were sent to {oldEmail} and {newEmail}. Enter both below.
account.email_change_resend: Didn't get the codes? Resend both
account.email_change_success_subtitle: Your address is now {newEmail}. Other devices have been signed out.
manage.transfer_recipient_must_have_acco: Recipient must already have a Kasero account.
manage.edit_name_hero_subtitle: The wordmark people will see at the top of every receipt.
manage.edit_name_success_subtitle: Every receipt and roster now reads under the new wordmark.
manage.edit_location_hero_subtitle: Sets how money, dates, and numbers are formatted across the app.
manage.edit_location_currency_note: Currency follows from the region you pick.
manage.edit_location_success_subtitle: Prices, dates, and number formats now read in the new region.
manage.edit_logo_hero_subtitle: A logo, a photo, or leave it and we'll use the trade icon.
manage.edit_logo_size_hint: PNG, JPG, or WebP up to 2MB
manage.edit_logo_success_subtitle: The new mark now reads on the hub, the receipts, and every roster row.
manage.transfer_hero_subtitle: The new owner takes full control. You stay on as a partner unless they remove you.
manage.transfer_no_team: No teammates yet. Invite one from the Team tab, or send the request straight to an email below.
manage.transfer_confirm_target_eyebrow: Type the business name to confirm
manage.cancel_transfer_hero_subtitle: The request stops here. Your ownership is unchanged.
manage.cancel_transfer_note: You can send a fresh request to anyone else once this one is withdrawn.
manage.cancel_transfer_success_subtitle: The pending request to {email} has been pulled back. You can send a fresh one anytime.
manage.leave_business_hero_subtitle: You won't see this business on your hub anymore.
manage.leave_business_changes_role: Your role and access end immediately
manage.leave_business_changes_team: You're removed from the team list
manage.leave_business_changes_data: Products, orders, and sales stay with the business
manage.leave_business_changes_rejoin: You can rejoin only with a fresh invite
manage.delete_business_hero_subtitle: This ends the business for everyone — there is no recovery from here.
manage.delete_business_warning_orders: Every purchase order and provider link
team.roster.subtitle_manager: The people who show up. Invite, promote, or quietly retire them.
team.roster.subtitle_employee: The people who show up beside you. Tap a name to see who's who.
team.roster.solo_hint: Just you so far. Tap Invite to bring someone on.
team.disabled_cannot_sign_in: This user cannot sign in while their account is disabled.
team.account_settings_hint: To change your settings, go to
team.role_employee_description: Can register sales and view daily summary
team.role_partner_description: Full access to management, inventory, and settings
team.code_valid_days_n: Valid for {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
team.invite_v2.subtitle_step1: Pick a role first, then how long the invite stays open.
team.invite_v2.subtitle_partner_warning: A partner has manager-level access to nearly everything except ownership itself.
team.invite_v2.partner_bullet_team: Invite, promote, and remove team members
team.invite_v2.partner_bullet_off_limits: Cannot delete the business or transfer ownership
team.invite_v2.subtitle_delete: Once revoked, this code can no longer register a new team member. Existing members keep their access.
team.invite_v2.subtitle_deleted: The code is gone. New members will need a fresh invite.
team.member_v2.subtitle_partner_warning: Partners gain manager-level access. Only grant this to people you fully trust.
team.member_v2.partner_grant_exception: Cannot delete the business or transfer ownership.
team.member_v2.subtitle_demote_to_employ: Employees can register sales and view daily summaries, but can no longer manage the business.
team.member_v2.subtitle_promote_to_partn: Partners gain manager-level access across products, team, and cash sessions.
team.member_v2.demote_consequence_one: Register sales and view daily summaries.
team.member_v2.demote_consequence_keep: Past sales stay attributed to them.
team.member_v2.subtitle_remove: {name} will lose access immediately. They can rejoin only with a fresh invite. Their past sales stay attributed to them.
team.member_v2.role_success_promote_subt: {name} is a partner now. They can manage the team, products, and providers.
team.member_v2.role_success_demote_subti: {name} is an employee again. They can still ring up sales but not change settings.
team.member_v2.remove_success_subtitle: {name} no longer has access to this business.
sales.empty_state.no_products_desc: Add products in Manage to start ringing up sales.

sales.session.open_modal.title: Open session

sales.session.open_modal.starting_cash_h: Cash already in the drawer. Use 0 if empty.
sales.session.open_modal.error_already_o: A session is already open. Refresh and ring up sales there.
sales.session.open_modal.success_subtitl: The till is alive. Ring up your first sale.
sales.session.close_modal.title: Close session?
sales.session.close_modal.count_helper: Count what's actually in the drawer right now.
sales.session.close_modal.error_not_open: Session is already closed. Refresh and try again.
sales.session.close_modal.step0_title: How much is in the drawer now?
sales.session.history_modal.title: Session history
sales.session.history_modal.row_count: {count, plural, =0 {No sales} one {# sale} other {# sales}}
sales.session.active_sales_modal.title: Session sales
sales.session.active_sales_modal.empty: No sales yet in this session.
sales.cart.modal_subtotal_meta: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} · subtotal
sales.cart.modal_error_session_closed: Session was closed. Open a new session to continue.
sales.cart.modal_error_stock_changed: Stock changed for one or more items. Review your cart.
sales.cart.modal_error_product_unavailab: An item is no longer available. Review your cart.
sales.cart.modal_error_generic: Couldn't process the sale. Try again.
business.error_no_access: You do not have access to this business
apiMessages.internal_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apiMessages.offline_mutation_blocked: You're offline. Try again when you reconnect.
apiMessages.cannot_delete_owns_business: Transfer ownership before deleting your account.
apiMessages.validation_string_too_short: Must be at least {min, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}
apiMessages.validation_string_too_long: Must be at most {max, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}
apiMessages.auth_email_taken: An account with this email already exists
apiMessages.otp_invalid: That code is incorrect or expired. Request a new one and try again.
apiMessages.email_change_target_taken: Another account already uses that email.
apiMessages.email_change_otp_sent: We sent verification codes. Check both inboxes.
apiMessages.product_icon_too_large: Icon is too large. Maximum size is 100KB.
apiMessages.product_icon_invalid_type: Product icon must be a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF image.
apiMessages.product_pending_order_block: This product is part of a pending order. Receive or cancel that order first.
apiMessages.product_forbidden_not_manage: Only partners and owners can manage products
apiMessages.barcode_duplicate: Another product already uses this barcode
apiMessages.barcode_source_requires_valu: Barcode source requires a barcode value
apiMessages.barcode_source_invalid: Invalid barcode source for this value
apiMessages.categories_not_found_in_busi: Some categories do not belong to this business
apiMessages.stock_concurrency_conflict: Stock changed since you opened this view. Please refresh and try again.
apiMessages.order_forbidden_not_manager: Only partners and owners can manage orders
apiMessages.provider_forbidden_not_manag: Only partners and owners can manage providers
apiMessages.provider_notes_limit_reached: You can only have {max} notes per provider
apiMessages.sale_product_not_found: One of the products in this sale could not be found.
apiMessages.sale_product_inactive: One of the products in this sale is no longer available.
apiMessages.sale_insufficient_stock: Not enough stock for one or more items.
apiMessages.sale_invalid_date: Sale date must be at most 1 minute in the future and within the past year.
apiMessages.session_already_open: A session is already open for this business.
apiMessages.session_not_open: No session is open. Open one before ringing up sales or closing.
apiMessages.session_forbidden_not_manage: Only owners and partners can open or close sessions.
apiMessages.team_forbidden_not_manager: Only managers can manage team members and invites
apiMessages.team_partner_cannot_mutate_p: Partners cannot change another partner's role or status. Ask the business owner.
apiMessages.team_user_not_found: User not found in this business
apiMessages.team_cannot_change_own_role: You cannot change your own role
apiMessages.team_cannot_change_owner_rol: You cannot change the owner's role
apiMessages.team_cannot_change_own_statu: You cannot change your own status
apiMessages.team_cannot_change_owner_sta: You cannot change the owner's status
apiMessages.team_cannot_remove_self: Use leave business to remove yourself.
apiMessages.invite_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
apiMessages.invite_wrong_recipient: This transfer is for a different email address
apiMessages.invite_already_member: You are already a member of this business
apiMessages.invite_user_is_disabled: Your access to this business has been disabled. Contact the owner to be re-enabled.
apiMessages.invite_expiry_out_of_range: Invite duration must be between 1 hour and 30 days.
apiMessages.invite_cap_reached: This business has reached the maximum of {max} active invite codes. Delete one before creating another.
apiMessages.transfer_forbidden_not_owner: Only the owner can perform this action
apiMessages.transfer_cannot_self: You cannot transfer the business to yourself
apiMessages.transfer_recipient_not_found: No one on Kasero has that email. Ask them to sign up first, then try again.
apiMessages.transfer_pending_exists: You already have a pending transfer. Cancel it first.
apiMessages.transfer_invalid_or_expired: Invalid, expired, or already accepted transfer code
apiMessages.transfer_wrong_recipient: This transfer is for a different email address
apiMessages.transfer_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
apiMessages.transfer_recipient_disabled: This account has been disabled and cannot accept ownership.
apiMessages.transfer_owner_gone: The original owner is no longer available. The transfer cannot be completed.
apiMessages.business_owned_cap_reached: You can own at most {max} businesses. Delete or transfer one before creating another.
apiMessages.business_only_owner_can_dele: Only the owner can delete a business
apiMessages.business_owner_cannot_leave: Owners cannot leave a business. Transfer ownership or delete the business instead.
apiMessages.user_delete_owns_businesses: You cannot delete your account while you own businesses. Transfer ownership or delete those businesses first.
apiMessages.user_delete_confirm_email_mi: The email you typed does not match your account email
apiMessages.ai_rate_limited: Rate limit reached. Try again in a few seconds.
apiMessages.ai_quota_exhausted: AI service is temporarily unavailable (token credits exhausted). Please try again later.
apiMessages.business_icon_invalid: Icon must be a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF image under 2MB
apiMessages.business_update_forbidden: Only the business owner can edit the business name, logo, type, region, or currency.
apiMessages.business_update_logo_too_lar: Logo file is too large. Maximum 2 MB.
apiMessages.business_update_logo_invalid: Logo must be an image file.
apiMessages.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
apiMessages.rate_limiter_unavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few seconds.
apiMessages.request_too_large: That file is too large. Please choose a smaller one.
apiMessages.request_length_required: Request was missing a Content-Length header. Please try again.
apiMessages.realtime_publish_unavailable: Couldn't deliver the update. Please try again.
productAddEdit.entry_subtitle: Pick a path. You can change everything later.
productAddEdit.choice_snap_desc: Point the camera and we'll fill in the rest.
productAddEdit.choice_manual_desc: Enter the details yourself, your way.
productAddEdit.barcode_placeholder: Scan or generate a code to see the visual.
productAddEdit.delete_bullet_records: The product disappears from your catalog.
productAddEdit.delete_bullet_pos: Sales history stays intact, but the product can no longer be sold.
productSettings.hero_subtitle: How products sort, what's pre-picked, and the shelves they sit on.
productSettings.delete_inline_prompt: Delete {name}? Products in it become uncategorized.
productSettings.default_category_none_to: Open Manage categories to add one.
productSettings.no_categories_hint: Type a name above and tap Add.
productSettings.manage_hero_subtitle: Add, rename, reorder, or remove the shelves your products sit on.
products.info_drawer_no_barcode_caption: Ask a manager to add one
productAddEdit.step_price_helper: What you charge per unit at the register.
productAddEdit.step_initial_stock_helper: How many you've got today. You can adjust later.
productAddEdit.step_stock_edit_hint: Currently {count, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}} in stock. Swipe the row in the products list and tap Inventory to adjust.
productAddEdit.step_barcode_subtitle: Scan, generate, or type a barcode. Skip if there isn't one.
productAddEdit.review_ai_disclaimer: These fields were filled in by AI and may be wrong. Double-check the name, price, category and barcode before saving.
productAddEdit.active_hint: Turn this off when you're not selling this product right now. It stays in your catalog but hides from the sales page.
email_verify_body: Your verification code is {code}. It expires in 10 minutes.
email_verify_instruction: Enter this code in Kasero to verify your email address.
email_verify_ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
verify_email_instruction: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to continue.
verify_error_generic: Couldn't verify the code. Try again.
verify_error_resend: Couldn't send a new code. Try again in a moment.
profile_phone_help: We never share this. Required later if you turn on SMS sign-in.
phone_invalid: That phone number doesn't look right.
expenses.empty_body: Track money spent on supplies, fees, and other costs.
inventory.empty_body: Add products first, then return here to adjust stock levels.
